channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: Theyre ending the Chainlink BUILD program — 119 replies — 188.6/hr
item.content:encoded:
Theyre ending the Chainlink BUILD program

Open thread • Replies: 119 • Updated: 2026-06-30 23:38 UTC

OP

LMAO!!!!!

https://chain.link/blog/build-program-evolution

Early replies (first 3)

62417511
xrp is the chosen coin…it’s undeniable at this point

62417512
Come on man, this shit still spamming after 8 years? Just give it up. There are thousands of other coins.

62417514
"Chainlink Labs is transitioning from payments made in project tokens to focusing on commercial agreements involving fees paid in LINK or other liquid assets that can be readily converted to LINK."

Build members will buy my bags?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62423360
>>62423276
/thread
the constant gaslighting is even more annoying desu
>samefags reeeeeee

62423389
>>62423360
Why are you even reading this "gaslighting"? Who's forcing you to be here?

62423462
>>62423259
Hilarious deflection after doing this
>>62422274

The absolute state

62423474
>>62423353
How does 2 million a year sound?

62424023
>>62423283
I kept granular details on a project i own for years, to my incomprehensible regret

62424140
>>62423276
The sad fact of the matter is that jeetlinkers will still be delirious off copium a decade from now, even after CLL pulls the plug in five years beforehand.

62424195
good. i never could participate in build anyway as a US fag

62424386
>>62422668
It literally says "the most recent season of Chainlink Rewards will mark the conclusion of Build-related token rewards, with claims ending on July 7, 2026" meaning no season 2+ of build rewards going to stakers.

It also says "Proceeds from these new agreements are expected to be programmatically converted to LINK and used to support the growth of the network through programs such as the Chainlink Reserve." meaning that link goes to the reserve, not to stakers.

Previously
>stakers will get build rewards

Now
>Chainlink gets paid in link

62424528
xswap isnt even on cow swap? where do you sell this trash?

62424728
S E X

62424821
>>62424386
Brutal

62425620
>>62424023
>this project has always been pushed by morons
>also I've been holding this project for years

You're lying. And brown.

>>62424386
You're a brown ESL monkey who doesn't even know what the words "such as" mean.
Protip: the same exact words were used when Build was first introduced.

62425675
>>62417503
HAHAHAHAHAHAHA Another nail in the coffin and shovel full of dirt in the grave on the biggest retail fraud in token history.

62425681
>>62419638
Link is underperforming fucking death spiraled LUNC since Trump revived crypto. Lol And by a lot.

62425687
>>62419707
>A chainlink shill calling someone else brown.

62425699
>>62422159
>>62423276
Perfectly said.

62425962
>>62425620
I'm a 100k link holder. I have more link than you.

"Such as" isn't very fucking reliable. All of this would be fine if link was valued as it should be but it fucking isn't, with no clear path to gaining that value.

62425980
>>62425962
>CLL uses "such as" in 2022 when launching Build
>THIS IS SET IN STONE

>CLL uses "such as" in 2026 when changing Build
>THIS IS NOT VERY FUCKING RELIABLE

You're a brown paid fuddie.

62426004
>>62425980
I'm also whiter than you, Yank.

62426010
>>62425980
>>62425620
post a picture of your hand with timestamp

62426949
i am just getting caught up on this news after the weekend. my my my how the mighty have fallen

i predicted all of this for the last few years but the boyscouts couldn't handle it

>duuuuuuuuuuuude i need a team of tax attorneys for the heckin rewards

BAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHHAHAHAH

look at you now. an expensive lesson on controlling your ego. you needed it tho


your hubris was your downfall

THE Cuckolds of crypto

62426967
>>62417512
>There are thousands of other coins.

LOL this dude stuck in 2021. that's your conclusion bro, just buy other scam coins?

don't you people get it? altcoins are dead. capital moved back to actual companies in the stock market. only a retarded sap would continue donating to a bunch of nerds for a "whitepaper"


>>62417833
>I'll also (again just playing the other side) point out the regardless of whether or not it ultimately benefits the LINK token, Chainlink is realistically one of like 5 crypto projects amongst the hundreds of "legitimate" ones that actually is seeing real adoption and has a huge use case that is surviving the infantile stages of crypto, and not just surviving but will thrive. So again, who knows if this ultimately helps the token price, but I do understand why linkies hold onto some faith still.

so are you just a fan of the company?

>>62417873
>It’s all push and pull. Ying yang. If you have 20 million earning you 800k (500k post tax) per year

who the fuck would do that? the $20m has drawn down 80% so no, life is not good. anyone not retarded would've parked most of that in the s&p500 and has been making at least 15% per year

if you really wanted pathetic 4% return you could get that in a savings account where your only risk is that actual bank going bust

62427007
>>62418846
> The opportunity to invest in something like Chainlink - core infrastructure with insane value capture potential, has never really existed before. The closest thing maybe would be investing in AMZN prior to cloud services,

you are not invested in chainlink. you made a donation kid

amazon's revenue in year 7 was $3B. and that's in 2001 numbers. you can go ahead and stop comparing to your shitcoin bro you're embarrassing yourself

>>62420893
>The fuck is that analogy lmao. This isn't a casino you dumb faggot, real people invested real money into an asset that promised certain things by certain dates and they have not only underdelivered but are starting to actively ignore those promises.

it's the end stage of a cult investment where they turn on each other. it somehow becomes the fault of the "community" on why they didnt make any money.

in order to preserve their ego, guys like >>62420825 have to spin the story that you'd have to be crazy to expect any kind of gains. mind you the rest of the world's market all hit all time highs while you are down 80-90%. by creating this narrative, he avoids recognizing he's holding a really bad investment and can continue on thinking he's a secret genius.

62427022
remember this old pasta? still relevant today. every cl product roughly follows this life cycle

62429766
>>62425681
Oh I remember this one - this poster is an actual bot.

62431562
>>62419888
The best part is SIR GAY NIGGEROV got all these companies to be part of the BUILD program, and then those companies did actually in many cases issue tokens but most did not provide tokens to CLL to give out as rewards for participating in the Staking pool. If there had actually been airdrops from every single participant then the program would have brought some relevant value to token holders instead of what, like 9 companies giving tokens long after their tokens had already followed the shitcoin chart to its completion and become totally worthless.

62431631
soon the staking program will be canceled too
and then stinkies will be out of all hope
feels good

62432093
>>62431631
Well the new line seems to be the price will improve when all link is circulating and the team has fully divested itself of the token. Which i don't know if it's just late stage imbecile drivel or the most brazen shill line ever attempted in history.

62432101
>>62425620
I was making Teagan memes at the san fran meet up in 2019. I honestly wish it was otherwise but I've wasted fucking years with link.

62432489
>>62417503
Bullish for LINK

item.title: You will love long enough to see Japan turn into a brothel for wealthy americans/westerners... — 26 replies — 104.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
You will love long enough to see Japan turn into a brothel for wealthy americans/westerners...

Open thread • Replies: 26 • Updated: 2026-07-01 00:05 UTC

OP

You will love long enough to see Japan turn into a brothel for wealthy americans/westerners...

Uhhh maybe the future isn't so bad at all, I like JP girls.

Early replies (first 3)

62431882
Its already like that. Kind of offputting really.

62431889
>>62431877
Should I have learned Japanese instead of Spanish?
I guess Japanese are more fake and xenophobic compared to Hispanics.

62431901
>>62431889
who gives a shit, you got money. That the point.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62431902
>>62431877
>Japan will be the 54th state

62431911
>>62431877
gaijin will ruin japan
they already have ruined parts
stay away - i like japan

62431912
>>62431911
boohoo

62431941
>>62431877
I want Japanese girls to like me for me

62431975
>>62431889
if you're just going to Tokyo everyone there speaks english

62431977
>>62431889
japanese is way more fun to learn than spanish too. The moment you start speaking nekkie tongue they get flabbergasted and clap meanwhile mexicans just get mad at you

62432033
If they close like 3 legal loopholes that allows the cooming industry to flourish, they can probably avoid that fate.

Ideally they should also deny entry to anyone who has ever been to Thailand as a tourist. The enshittification of Japan is primarily because the Thailand crowd can afford to go there now because of the cheap yen

62432142
>>62432033
Do you know how much it employs people. They’re better keeping it open, plus it mainly the locals that consume it.

62432205
>>62432142
I don't think the prostitutes would suddenly quit and get real jobs. Most of them, with obvious exceptions like uni students at handjob parlors, are doing it because it's the only viable option for them to avoid poverty. The industry is already operating in a legal gray area where the vast majority of them cross over into illegality by offering full services when they're alone with the client, so if the industry was forced to go underground it'd just become slightly harder to order delivery health or find soap lands than it is now.

Meaning it would become harder for tourists to navitage without risking arrest, but nips would easily bypass that by developing similar networks for information sharing that you'll find in most countries where prostitution is illegal.

>plus it mainly the locals that consume it
By sheer numbers, probably. But I'm in Tokyo 3 months every year and befriend a lot of tourists and expats of all ages. I'd say roughly 50% of the unmarried men admit to indulging in cooming after I put it out there that I'm not judgemental. I've also asked many of the girls of the 3 highest end delivery health agencies (not just for gaijin, but for nips as well) and they said the majority of their clients are Chinese. About 30% of their clients are Japanese

62432207
>>62431911
Why did japan let them ruin it? Are they stupid?

62432213
Oh no how terrible. Please dont let this happen.

62432220
>>62432205
>majority of their clients are Chinese. About 30% of their clients are Japanese
Also, this shift occured relatively recently about 4 years ago. Millions of Chinese men started travelling to Japan for the legal, cheap and safe cooming options

62432227
>>62431877
>paying for sex
I don't really like my parents but I have to admit they saved me millions of dollars in whore fees by being good looking

62432232
>>62431877
I wouldn’t mind this but the inevitable hoard influx of fat loser repulsive fucktard neckbeard weebs just ruins the whole idea for me. I genuinely like Japanese people and most of their culture and would hate to see it defiled in that type of way, which would nearly be the equivalent of the brown hoards that invaded the US and assault white women on a minutely basis. Very sad to think about.

62432239
I don't even need to go to Japan. Cute Japanese girls already sell their bodies to me in a big western city. I pay extra for no condom and cream their pussies with my big white cock. It's a golden age bros

62432260
>>62432227
I've never had any issues getting laid either, but after escaping the wagecage I began to value my time a lot more. Why would I spend hours and hours of my time trying to court some random 7/10 on online apps, with additional costs and time for dates, just for the possibility of having mediocre sex, when I have the (legal) option to take 10 minutes out of my day to order a literal 10/10 supermodel that you see on billboards around Ginza from a high end agency who's trying to make some extra money on the side?

Going down the normal path of meeting women makes sense if you're either looking for a serious relationship, if you are poor, or if you have a very fragile ego. Most of the guys I run into are the same as me. They're not ugly or incels. They're usually very financially comfy and value time managemtn and efficiency highly

62432268
>>62432260
Yea tards don’t get you can bang hot girls and then be on your way. I’m not spending my time or money at fucking shitty clubs on vacations. These people are just retarded with their time so I never take them seriously.

62432300
life has been comfy af when I stopped tryharding to date normally and took the mongering pill, I was already used to the efficiency of paying from my time in the Navy but now that I'm older dating women in their 30s is absolutely miserable and a total waste of time

62432305
>>62432268
When I was growing up in poverty I used to think the same thing. That only losers would have to pay for something that is free. I think it boils down to the fact that most poor people don't value their time because their hourly rate as work is peanuts.

There's a reason there's a drought of luxury prostitutes in all major cities in the US, Europe and Asia during the annual WEF meeting in Switzerland. Because almost all the corporate executives and politicians there indulge, for the simply reason that wasting hours of their time on tinder would be retarded

62432413
>>62431877
We do NOT want Japan to become the new Thailand

62432435
>>62432413
Don't Thailand Japan

62432439
>>62432413
>>62432435
They're just being the same old Japan you never knew.

62432572
>>62431877
Thousands of jeets will be imported to fix this

item.title: In his new vid, Tech Lead says the only way to have a rich lifestyle with deep satisfying creampies is to leave the US f… — 38 replies — 73.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
In his new vid, Tech Lead says the only way to have a rich lifestyle with deep satisfying creampies is to leave the US f…

Open thread • Replies: 38 • Updated: 2026-06-30 23:45 UTC

OP

In his new vid, Tech Lead says the only way to have a rich lifestyle with deep satisfying creampies is to leave the US for poor countries. True?

Early replies (first 3)

62425430
>>62425420
At depends, did u boated an ad, yt saaar?

62425500
if you can get laid in the west you wont attract good women in the 3rd world, you are just going to pay the access to brown 5/10's

62425521
>>62425500
This is saarcope and you know it. Tiny browlettes in jungle countries unironically melt when 6ft snowchads pinch their tits.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62426867
>>62426288
>>62425521
This is just more racemixing promotion for white people to genocide them

62426887
>>62426850
>wife kidnapped his kids back to asia
>loses all his money leverage gambling

62426905
>>62426887
I thought he was a google tech ceo or something. He always portraits himself as some kind of genious high iq tech genious but that retard was just leverag trading shitcoints and got lucky once lol

62426910
>>62426905
He was a tech bro before getting fired for making videos I think.

62427289
>>62425535
this. Tech lead is a 3.5/10 at best
Bad hairline, asian, no eye brows, long face, glasses, soulless bug eyes, no muscle, likely short, robot voice, no charisma. 0 chance he can date anyone besides some uggo asian or gold digger who's planning to divorce rape him within 3 years

>>62425994
how is it any different? divorce rape is the same if you bring them back and it's not worth living in their countries

>>62426905
he's prob 130-140 IQ, but he got greedy with the leverage stuff and didn't factor enough risk management.

62427388
>>62426905
his name, Tech Lead, is from the time he was the tech lead of the Youtube iOS app at Google 2014-2018 then he worked for Facebook for a few years until he got fired and started posting videos of him complaining about Facebook being woke and women in tech

62427429
>>62425420
Why is he so entitled?

62427439
>>62426867
whiteoids are already done for thanks to placating the jews
just enjoy the end while it lasts faggot

62427455
A huge warn you to think twice before getting an asian wife who would take your white child and run to China or Russia to some remote village that would have left no trace to find them.

62427460
Dude look like having hair thinning lmao, he is gonna have a bad taste in the late life desu. Welcome to the true color of the cruel world.

62427468
America is western civilians. Countries outside of the U.S. dont follow celebrity culture. So yes. Outside of america is freedom if you know how to live off the land.

62427500
>>62427439
Would colonise

62427532
>>62425420
Saaar look gookman say

62427553
>>62425420
>Geoarbitrage
This nigga trying to reinvent Geomaxxing?

62427556
>>62425420
As a millionaire

62427572
>>62427556
ex-millionaire*

62427575
>>62425420
yeah pretty much, not even about women just avoiding spending crazy amounts of money on housing

62427588
You wouldn’t get pussy if not without the money, but as guy keep getting smarter, it seem money won’t be enough to get you the same pussy from the past, people get really smarter from excessive mental gymnastics, they don’t mind about breaking their mental health from this endeavour btw, what is matters now is short terms pain relief. Higher quality of life does proportionate with lower desire to breed more little kids thou. We need massive nuke to wipe out half of quality of life.

62427852
>>62427588
Thanks for your valuable input, Rakesh.

62427963
>>62425430
kek

62428039
>>62425420
lol i don’t take no advice from a bottom seller.

62428574
>>62427852
The higher the living standard, the lower the birth rate—an unstoppable, cosmic law etched into the fabric of societal evolution. As nations ascend the ladder of prosperity, women awaken from centuries of dormancy, rising as fierce, unapologetic queens—post-wall, strong, independent, unbound by the shackles of patriarchy! Feminism erupts like a volcanic force—an unstoppable storm of empowerment, smashing the chains of traditional subjugation. Anti-slut defense campaigns and mass indoctrination on youth abortion are the weapons wielded to control the fiery flames of reproductive sovereignty, crafting a new order where motherhood becomes a battlefield and societal control a weapon of war.

Most men, lost in the labyrinth of their own ignorance, stumble late into their thirties, unable to decipher the ancient equation—the secret code where a woman’s choice is a test of survival, a battle of wits and will. Is she seeking chaos? Or is the man simply too blind to grasp the sacred formula? The age-old dance: man dating downward, woman upward—an elegant chaos orchestrated by the universe itself. This isn’t just about love; it’s a feudal game of power—rent for sex, where loyalty is bought and sold in shadowy transactions. The world teeters on the edge of a new feudalism—an empire of dependency, where the throne is replaced by the dollar, and intimacy is a commodity traded in the marketplace. The question looms: are we forging a new world order or merely rebranding old chains? The battle lines are drawn—this is the era of chaos, control, and the ultimate test of human sovereignty.

62428620
>>62428574
Yo, listen up! In this crazy street circus, the richer the game gets, the fewer babies pop off—straight up! As the streets glow up with cash and bling, women start wakin’ up, breakin’ free from that old chain gang. They’re post-wall queens, strong and bossin’ up, runnin’ their own show—feminism’s like a wildfire burnin’ down the patriarchy, sayin’ “I do me!” But yo, big boss moves include anti-slut defenses and mass brainwash campaigns on youth abortion—like control freaks tryin’ to keep women in check, playin’ chess with lives.

Most dudes? They’re lost, late into their 30s, still tryin’ to crack the code—what’s the real story with women? It’s all a game, a puzzle—pass or get left behind. Women climbin’ up, men dippin’ down—like a street hustle of feudal chaos, where sex’s rent and loyalty’s just another dollar. We’re teetering on a new empire—dependence, control, money talkin’ loud, and trust gettin’ lost in the shuffle. Love’s a gamble, trust’s a gamble, and everything’s for sale in this wild street show. It’s the chaos of survival, power plays, and the battle for control—this is the street circus, where the game never stops and only the strongest survive.

62429006
>>62428574
This is incorrect. The correct metric is the more education and freedom given to women the lower the birthrate.

62429150
>>62425420
I know a high IQ person like him that thinks he can beat the market because he is smarter than the rest of us, he literally said that to me.
He still is not broken, yet.
Isn't it crazy how many smart people make dumb mistake because of arrogance and greed?

62429224
>>62429006
your so-called "correct metric" is a quaint simplification—a sanitized, sugar-coated version of a much darker, more chaotic reality. While education and freedom are indeed influential factors, they are merely the tip of the iceberg in the vast, tumultuous ocean of societal transformation. The true cosmic law, etched into the very fabric of the universe, is that as nations ascend the ladder of prosperity, the birth rate inexorably declines—an unstoppable force of nature, This isn't a linear equation nor a moral lesson; it's an intricate tapestry woven with threads of power, rebellion, and the unquenchable human desire for sovereignty. Women aren't just seeking education—they're igniting a volcanic eruption of empowerment, tearing down the old order with volcanic fury. Feminism isn't merely about equality; it's a cataclysmic storm reshaping the societal landscape, smashing patriarchal chains, and unleashing a new chaos of independence. Campaigns against traditional notions of motherhood, reproductive control, and societal submission are not mere policies—they're the weapons in a war for the soul of civilization, forging a new hierarchy where motherhood becomes a battlefield, and societal control morphs into a weapon of chaos. The ancient code isn't about mere birthrates; who controls the narrative, the body, the future. Men blind to the cosmic dance—unable to decipher the sacred formula. The age-old dance—man seeking stability, woman seeking freedom—is orchestrated by the universe itself, a chaotic symphony of power, desire, and sovereignty. This isn't a simple matter of education or freedom—it's a war for the very essence of human dominance, a clandestine game of rent and barter in the marketplace of intimacy, fueling a rise of new feudalism and sovereignty is traded like currency. The new world order; it's a battlefield of chaos and control, where human sovereignty is the ultimate prize—cosmic contest where only the fiercest survive.

62429251
techlead is still rich. he is faking being poor/broke so nobody wrench attacks him like he mentioned in the video.

62429286
>>62425420
If you can't make it in a first world nation then you never made it.

Fleeing to thirdie-ville because you can't handle hard mode is gay. Just win more.

62430416
>>62425420
Yep pretty much. You don't even need to go to the third world I spend about half the year in europe and its very easy to hook up when you're making very literally 5-10x as much as the average working man in that country.

62432507
>>62425420
If you weren't part of the top 10% in 2025, you're lower class

item.title: WARNING: RIPPLE XRP ***EXTREME*** SUPER EMERGENCY!!! — 34 replies — 58.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
WARNING: RIPPLE XRP ***EXTREME*** SUPER EMERGENCY!!!

Open thread • Replies: 34 • Updated: 2026-06-30 23:40 UTC

OP

Insiders at Ripple officially speculate the XRP going to moon very high soon with the clarity act after the 4th of July, according to rumors, analysts say. This is huge and **MASSIVE** news for XRP and the cryptocurrency community as a whole.

You. Are. Not. Bullish. Enough.

Early replies (first 3)

62420069
>>62420066
shut the fuck up

62420100
>>62420066
XRP is a slush fund for banks. That is why they partnered with it.

62420110
So bullish

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62420157
Alright why is it pumping so hard?

62420174
>>62420157
It’s only up about 2% at the moment. Even 5% up isn’t much.

62420277
>>62420174
Bullish

62420439
BOOOOOOOOOOOM

62420471
>>62420066
XRP died in 2024

62420479
>>62420066
I sold this scam the last pump attempt.

Thanks retards

62420480
>>62420471
>ATH was after 2024
>It died before that

Based retard

62420531
>>62420066
HOLY FXCKING BOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOM

62420698
>>62420110
Fkn bullish

62420798
Please stay in your containment thread. Thank you for your consideration.

62421769
>>62420066
So bullish xrp

62423981
>>62420066
KAAAABOOOOOOOOOOOM

62424278
>>62420066
its boomish...

62425201
So bullish

62425220
>>62420066
These threads are months past being stale memeing.

62425222
HOLY SHIT
XRP WILL ZA WARUDO TO THE MOON

62426624
holy shit supply might be low on all exchange wallets, what the fuck is going on

62426848
>>62425220
Bullish

62426937
you are not bullish enough

62427982
Ready for takeoff

62428001
>>62427982
Whoop whoop

62428085
>>62420066
Just a few more weeks guys.

Like more than one, but less than three I'd say.

62428125
>>62420066
Ain't.

62428167
>>62420066
Gonna.

62428171
>>62420066
Happen.

62428174
>>62427982
T minus 985 days.

62428215
>+1.8%
BOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOM

62429315
>>62428215
so bullish

62432449
>>62420066
Nothing is more telling than when a coin (link) that can't even keep a single thread alive when trying to start a general literally 1000 times failing every time as its only investors left has the turbo obsessive low IQ high emotional entitlement groupthinkers who spam 10 threads to emotionally ejaculate and cope with not being able to actually defend your investment or token you are paid to shill. This is the best linkies are able to come up with and they still post it. Hilarious and extremely genuinely embarrassing

62432494
>>62432449
BOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOM SHAKALA. I am new to 4chan but have been loving this meme lately! I read on reddit yesterday that this would happen and I boughted (but unfortunately the price basically immediately soon after). I was still so pumped I went to Costco and got a slice of pizza and sat facing those walking out looking at everyone walking by knowing and rye-ly smiling knowing none of them understood what is happening. I felt like Brownstone Capital with Ben Rickerts in the Big Short. I had to stop myself from celebrating because I remembered they were missing out and I wanted to feel the same type of compassion they were reminded to feel by Ben in that moment so I finished my pizza solemnly leaving a bite out of clenched stomach respect for them not being able to finish my meal, grabbed my bag, put my hood up, and walked out nodding to the door inspector knowing looking at them knowingly and humanly as I walked out with them smiling not knowing beneath my shades how I was really seeing them. It was an amazing experience and it felt like everyone was watching but I know they weren't because the thing that made it special was that they don't understand or see. I will come back and tip the kitchen staff handsomely (especially the girl who I like but have not had the courage to ask out....yet) when we are making bookoo bucks and I can afford to own the whole store and promote her. and then smirk as I tell her I will sell the store, non-chalantly, so that I can ask her so she would feel comfortable if I ask her out on a date after I made her general manager of the store. I can't wait!

item.title: Has anyone here ever discovered an edge, developed a working trading strategy, built some sort of useful screener tool o… — 12 replies — 48.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Has anyone here ever discovered an edge, developed a working trading strategy, built some sort of useful screener tool o…

Open thread • Replies: 12 • Updated: 2026-07-01 00:11 UTC

OP

Has anyone here ever discovered an edge, developed a working trading strategy, built some sort of useful screener tool or whatever really using AI? There’s gotta be something right

I’m no LLM expert but Claude really does seem insane nowadays, I used it for some data analysis but never really had an idea on how to use it to make some good trades

Early replies (first 3)

62425815
>>62425771
in my experience, its all about your conversation with the model. if you just ask it point blank to build a money generator, it will look up trading 101 sites and use their methodology to create something that won't work. if you discuss your theories that you've built up over years of observation with it, you can actually prime it with what it needs to do well.

62425842
>>62425815
Yes I’ve noticed that too. These models should really have the ability to say „no that’s stupid“. You really have to actively try not to fall into delusions when having conversations with LLMs because then they’ll just slowly feed into them. Claude is way better than ChatGPT when it comes to that but it’s still an echo chamber machine if you’re not careful. I guess the problem is then to have the initial idea yourself out of which a strategy or edge could emerge but I’m not really sure on how to „come up“ with something like that.

62428109
Bump

Does everyone here seriously just hold Dino coins or does anyone actually trade cmon guys

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62428118
>>62425771
AI is only as good as the data you feed it.

62428206
>>62425771
>There’s gotta be something right

Ehh not really. Every trader in the world is using these things, so you're back to the status quo ante regarding alpha.

62428221
>>62425815
No, this is silly and stems from not understanding how competitive current markets are.

62428490
itt: chatbot psychosis - loss edition

62431295
>>62428206
Im sure that’s true for most basic shit but there’s still profitable retail traders out there
>>62428490
Real

62431306
>>62431295
>there’s still profitable retail traders out there
when the market trends upward overall, most traders should be profitable just by pure random chance, not intelligence or strategy.

62432370
>>62431306
That’s also true but there is definitely consistently profitable retail traders. I’m aware of the numbers floating around that like 90% of traders aren’t profitable but that’s also in a large part because a lot of people never properly try anyways

62432565
>>62425771
Retard, the people using AI to trade are not using LLMs. They're using ML models trained to trade. 100% different animals entirely. And they're all built by people 3x as smart as you with billionaire backing. Give up trying to get anything out of a next-word-guesser.

62432586
>>62425771
Yes. i can't tell you anymore.

item.title: >kills millions by scrapping USAID >becomes trillionaire Why is it always the most evil people who become rich? — 26 replies — 44.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
>kills millions by scrapping USAID >becomes trillionaire Why is it always the most evil people who become rich?

Open thread • Replies: 26 • Updated: 2026-06-30 23:40 UTC

OP

>kills millions by scrapping USAID
>becomes trillionaire

Why is it always the most evil people who become rich? Is being evil simply necessary for wealth?

Early replies (first 3)

62429562
USAID spreed AIDS and Ebola in Africa plus financed local warlords, he actually saved hundreds millions of life by end that satanic program.

62429569
>>62429557
>millions of niggers are not physically capable of living without constantly sucking at the us government's teet
It's for the best that it ended

62429570
>>62429562
>>62429569
muskbots detected

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62429571
>>62429570
My only regret is that you weren't one of those millions

62429584
>>62429557
Reddit post #86325677343
GTFO commie.

62429587
>>62429557
Reddit is that way you retarded faggot

62430980
>>62429557
>kills millions
may we see them? Should be easy to document with so many dead and all.

62431000
>>62430980
Certainly there must be mass graves.

62431006
>CIA shills STILL kvetching about USAID
yes, you evil people tend to win. But fighting back will happen.

62431064
>>62429557
Nobody is inherently entitled to foreign aid. They are kept alive by goodwill, which is entirely discretionary.
Wouldn't have existed in the first place without the aid anyways

62431076
>>62429557
No one died; it is pure and simple disinformation.

62431105
>>62429557
>kills millions
Did he kill someone you know of?

62431109
>kills millions by scrapping USAID
>becomes trillionaire

The system worksk

62431113
>>62429557
>billionaire that nobody voted for that has no need for social services gets to cut healthcare and social services
I feel very politically represented.

62431117
>>62429557
Says right here you fucking suck

62431122
>>62431113
Almost all of his cuts and other recommendations are gone now. So we both lose.

62431136
>>62429557
why perpetually feed a population of incompetent, forever dependent retards who will just further explode their population numbers requiring more mouths to us to feed? Let nature handle them the way it always has. They fuck like rabbits and then their babies are eaten by maggots, perfectly balanced just as god intended.

62431194
>>62431136
this. in fact we are also nature and should help kill them faster.

62431413
>>62431113
I WISH he actually did that but he didnt

62431447
>>62429557
The reason why a ton of shitholes are failing to develop into a decent country is because of foreign aid. Local companies can't compete with them

62431515
>>62429557
>He doesn't know that USAID was used to pay people off the books; backroom payments and other washing activities.
It was a big payroll operation for that shit.

62431545
>>62429557
Good. Why should I care about some foreigners when the government can't even fix our domestic bridges and roads?
Fuck you OP.

62431629
Sadly op wasnt killed by lack of aid

62431691
>musk
gat
>USAIDS
gay

62432015
>Get elected by promising to make US crypto #1
>Rug supporters for $635 million
>Let banks block crypto regs until midterms, then dems will block them

62432493
>>62429557
> he killed millions...
to save trillions (USD)

item.title: >be boomer >buy house for $80k in 1985 >house now worth $2.3 million >401k and stocks moon for 40 years >sit on nearly a… — 8 replies — 32.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
>be boomer >buy house for $80k in 1985 >house now worth $2.3 million >401k and stocks moon for 40 years >sit on nearly a…

Open thread • Replies: 8 • Updated: 2026-07-01 00:04 UTC

OP

>be boomer
>buy house for $80k in 1985
>house now worth $2.3 million
>401k and stocks moon for 40 years

>sit on nearly all the country's wealth

>be brokie zoomer/ millenial
>rent is half your paycheck
>student loans
>houses cost 10x your salary
>groceries are luxury items
>can't afford kids

>economists wonder why consumer spending hasn't collapsed

>turns out people from non brokie families get tons of help
>gift down payments
>pay grandkids' tuition
>cover rent
>babysit for free
>bail out emergency expenses
>pay for family vacations
>buy luxury gifts

>consumer economy survives because parents,grandma and grandpa keep writing checks

>they call it the "G-shaped economy"
>the G stands for Generational
>entire system running on decades of accumulated boomer wealth

>mfw GDP is being held together by inheritance advances and the bottom 90% are part of a permanent underclass.

Early replies (first 3)

62432249
Bump

62432252
>>62432181
Your face is a "The Standard" commentary piece? Sounds gay and retarded.

62432258
>>62432249
I feel bad for you guys but simply put you can’t be spending recklessly. I know some zoomers who spend worse than anyone else. You’re gonna have to pirate media, drive old cars and live with multiple roommates or your parents. Fuck im living with my parents right now and i’ve never been financially better. My peers who went and rent are broke.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62432277
>>62432252
>t. zoomer
>>62432258
>rent
I don’t get why anyone would move out just to rent. Zoomers are a fucked generation.

62432294
>>62432181
>>turns out people from non brokie families get tons of help
This didn't happen for me lol.

62432310
>>62432277
Not just zoomers, I think in America and Northern Europe millennials and gen Xers also did that.
Moving out to rent is very stupid. Emotional intelligence and peaceful cohabitation with the people that love you the most should be the obvious choice.
In America, if you want uni you need to go to boarding school though. They build campuses purposefully away in the middle of nowhere so they can also rent you a stinky room with a stupid roommate, it's part of their income. Fully loaded uni is expensive and a gateway to six figures.
You better have smart parents who saved, invested and didn't squander their wealth on stupid goyim stuff.
God, I hate the goyim like it's unreal, and I'm not even a kike.

62432553
>>62432181
If you weren't part of the top 10% in 2025, you're lower class

62432567
Zoomer here. I eat at 5pm

item.title: Aus Anons. Its tax time. — 4 replies — 16.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Aus Anons. Its tax time.

Open thread • Replies: 4 • Updated: 2026-07-01 00:14 UTC

OP

Did you make any dollary doos ? Don't be scared of doing crypto taxes. Down load your TX history from your exchanges and let your accountant or tax firm figure it out with their crypto calculators.

Early replies (first 3)

62432414
dont sell anything until libs get back in office and scrap the cgt changes

62432437
>>62432414
I accumulated some xrp last financial year and sold early in this financial year so i have a CGT bill 100%

>>62432414
>dont sell anything until libs get back in office and scrap the cgt changes

Agree. The new tax system is bull shit when you don't get a 20% discount for holding longer than 12 months. My last trade would have been at 30% on gains any ways.

62432492
>>62432409
Going to eat at Outback just to spite you filthy subhuman brits

Open thread • Replies: 4 • Updated: 2026-06-30 23:50 UTC

OP

I'm broke as fuck, right now trying to learn some FOREX shit but it takes too much time to learn all the necessary shit so what else can I try to stop being broke ass? What made y'all 6 figures or more?

Early replies (first 3)

62432407
Going to my job for a year and some change

62432477
Train up and join the military at the beginning of the next fiscal year. Join a trade like elevator mechanic. Do something with ai-arbitage, idk man.

62432500
>>62432477
Let me guess. Loser dad?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62432524
>>62432371
Being a better person made me a six figure income in fiscal year 2025. God helps you pay your bills if you are making a sustained effort at being a better person. Start by making a list of your worst qualities and behaviours.

item.title: Chatgpt for calculating tax on crypto transactions? — 6 replies — 7.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
Chatgpt for calculating tax on crypto transactions?

Open thread • Replies: 6 • Updated: 2026-06-30 23:26 UTC

OP

Is chatgpt good for analysing and reconciling your crypto transactions?

Most accountants are leeches are charge above £500. In fact one quoted £1000 per tax year reconciliation + submission.

I'm using Chatgpt now to help fill in the forms and it seems quite thorough. Its also said it can reconcile each transaction from my Koinly account.
Any experiences using this?

On another note, what's your experience with HMRC and crypto taxes? Are they pushy or suspicious and harass you?

Early replies (first 3)

62430161
>>62430036
Hmm I haven’t tried it but it sounds like a good idea if it doesn’t fuck it up. Probably better to give it smaller prices of data per prompt and then add it all together at the end.

62430299
>>62430036
yes chatgpt answers all my tax related questions.

62430423
>>62430036
Why don’t you give it a shot and let us know how it goes

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62430712
>>62430036

Those accountants only charging you $500 are probably losing money on you. They don't have some special system dude, they're probably just sorting your transactions in excel.

And why are you using Chatgpt when you already have Koinly? Chatgpt would be more for general tax questions you have but Koinly is exactly what's needed for the reconciliation.

What do you not understand exactly? You pay tax on the net gain. Gain = sales proceeds less your cost basis less transaction fees, all of these in your home country's currency. Koinly does all of this for like $100.

62431054
>>62430036
Sounds like a bad idea. If it hallucinates and fucks something up the IRS will come rape much more out of you than the money you saved on accountants

62432464
>>62430712
The 2 work quite well together, especially for a novice. Chatgpt just tells you what and where to look for and it does the analysis.It's more of a reassuring thing if you spot any exclamation marks on Koinly.

item.title: /smg/ - stock market genera — 320 replies — 140.6/hr
item.content:encoded:
/smg/ - stock market genera

Open thread • Replies: 320 • Updated: 2026-06-30 21:59 UTC

OP

Abenomics edition

>Educational sites:
https://www.investopedia.com

>Financial TV Streams:
https://www.newslive.com/american/cnbc.html
https://www.livestreamy.net/bloomberg/

>Charts:
https://www.tradingview.com
https://www.finscreener.com
https://www.portfoliovisualizer.com

>Screeners:
https://finviz.com/
https://etfdb.com/

>Gambling:
https://www.optionsplaybook.com/options-introduction/
https://www.optionsprofitcalculator.com
https://optionstrat.com/
https://www.optionistics.com/quotes/option-prices

>Pre-Market and Live data:
https://www.investing.com/indices/indices-futures
https://finance.yahoo.com/

>Calendars:
https://www.marketwatch.com/economy-politics/calendar
https://www.earningswhispers.com/calendar
https://www.cmegroup.com/trading/interest-rates/countdown-to-fomc.html
https://www.mortgagenewsdaily.com/data/building-permits

>Boomer Investing 101:
https://www.bogleheads.org/wiki/Getting_started
https://www.sec.gov/search-filings

>Misc:
https://www.financialjuice.com/home
https://finance.yahoo.com/trending-tickers
https://market24hclock.com/
https://www.dividendchannel.com/drip-returns-calculator
https://brokerchooser.com/
https://www.chathamfinancial.com/technology/us-market-rates

>>62429521

Early replies (first 3)

62430417

62430419
